Follow all guidelines in [.github/instructions/guidelines.instructions.md](instructions/guidelines.instructions.md).

## Monorepo Context

This workspace contains the monorepo alongside other projects. When working on monorepo-related tasks:

1. Read `monorepo/AGENTS.md` for routing guidance
2. Follow intent routing in `monorepo/docs/monorepo/intents/`
3. Use skills from `monorepo/skills/` tree
4. For service-local work, check the service's own `AGENTS.md` first

For sibling projects (non-monorepo), use their local conventions.
